# Learnings Index

This file is a lightweight, on-demand index of lessons learned.
Use one row per learning and link to the detailed learning record.

## Learnings Tracker

| Learning ID | Title | Category | Summary | Detailed Record | Related Backlog Items | Related ADRs | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| LRN-001 | `<title>` | `<architecture|implementation|testing|operations|delivery>` | `<one-line learning summary>` | [LRN-001-short-title.md](LRN-001-short-title.md) | `<BI-260001, REQ-FR-260001 or N/A>` | `<ADR-260001.md or N/A>` | Active |

## Tracker Rules

1. Keep this index concise; one-line summaries only.
2. Put full details in individual learning files.
3. Use stable IDs (`LRN-###`) and never reassign IDs.
4. Mark outdated learnings as `Superseded` instead of deleting history.
5. Load this file on-demand when recurring mistakes appear.
